case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR VS. NICOLINA MILANI-WALKER

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-30-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUL-10-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY SHEILA ROBLERO--SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
